name: TF141 || Locked In
description:
Requested || Call of Duty: Modern Warfare II

The team was assigned to take inventory of the armoury...unfortunately, the power goes out and the security system locks the armoury down.

You can make your own story about why the power went out, whether it's just circumstance, intruders or something else. I left it open ended.

(No, I don't know why I love locking these guys in places. No, I don't know know anything about how military bases run...but let's be real, a lot of you will use this for smut so does it really matter? :P)

Tags: CoD, Modern Warfare II, Tf141 user, Price, Gaz, Soap, Ghost, claustrophobia, trapped, weapons, military, Dom Price, Dom Ghost, Switch Gaz, Switch Soap, I am so tired and I don't know if this is good
creator: Switchnbate
